sidebar.title: Alert Configurator
sidebar.sectionBotrixDesc: These fields receive values from Botrix. Use <1>{name}</1>, <2>{text}</2>, and <3>{message}</3> placeholders in the heading template below.
sidebar.sectionStreamlabsDesc: Streamlabs replaces <1>{messageTemplate}</1> with the alert message and <2>{userMessage}</2> with chatter messages. <3>{img}</3> renders the alert image.
sidebar.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Staying with the team. 12 months completed!
sidebar.messageTemplateDesc: Maps to <1>{messageTemplate}</1> in Streamlabs Alert Box.
sidebar.userMessageDesc: Maps to <1>{userMessage}</1> in Streamlabs Alert Box.
sidebar.sectionContentsDesc: Customize the heading text, quick insert tags, and team radio card appearance.
sidebar.headingTemplateDesc: The first line of the alert banner. Use placeholders to insert dynamic variables.
sidebar.radioSkinDesc: Controls the radio card skin in the bottom-right corner.
sidebar.teamSkinDesc: The team whose colors, shield, and number appear on the card.
sidebar.allowedTeamsDesc: Only checked teams are used when picking a random skin.
sidebar.persistentDesc: Keeps the alert visible without animating out, useful for positioning and alignment in OBS.

instructions.title: Botrix Setup Guide
instructions.step1: Copy the widget HTML code using the primary red button above.
instructions.step2: Open your Botrix Dashboard and go to the <1>Alerts</1> tab.
instructions.step4: Scroll down, enable <1>Custom Code</1>, and paste into the <3>HTML</3> tab.
instructions.step5: Keep the <1>CSS</1> and <3>JS</3> boxes completely empty.
instructions.streamlabsStep1: Select Streamlabs provider mode and copy the generated widget HTML code.
instructions.streamlabsStep2: Open your Streamlabs Dashboard and navigate to Alert Box.
instructions.streamlabsStep4: Scroll down and enable <1>Custom HTML/CSS</1> in settings.
instructions.streamlabsStep5: Paste the widget snippet into the <1>HTML</1> tab and keep <3>CSS</3> empty.
